tip: [Eusan Nation] Great holes secretly are digged where earth's pores ought to suffice, and things have learnt to walk that ought to crawl.

[Eusan Nation] A Replika is a biomechanical humanoid maufactured by the Eusan Nation. The process to making them is tighly guarded secret but everyone knows that neural patterns from select citizens are used

[Eusan Nation] ADLR (Administration-, Datenverarbeitung-, Logistik-Replika), (Administration, Data Processing, Logistics Replika 'Eagle') or Adler, are Generation 5 High Command Specialist Replikas. Adlers are Protektor Führungskommando Administrator units managing and overseeing all administrative tasks for entire facilities
[Eusan Nation] ARAR (Allzweck-Reparatur-Arbeiter Replika), (All-Purpose Repair Worker Replika 'Macaw') or Ara, are Generation 2 Low-Cost General Purpose Replikas used in construction and repair.

[Eusan Nation] EULR (Einfache Universelle Leichte Replika), (Simple Universal Light Replika 'Owl') or Eule, are Generation 4 Low-Cost General Purpose Replikas. They are used in domestic tasks such as serving as Cooks, Nurses, Cleaning, as well as Simple Medical and Office duties

[Eusan Nation] FKLR (Führungskommando-Leitenheit-Replika), (Operational Command Control Unit Replika 'Falcon') or Falke, are Generation 6 High-Tech Bioresonance Command Replikas. They are the most advanced Replika type in service with the Eusan Nation and occupy command positions for Protektor units

[Eusan Nation] KLBR (Kommando-Leiteinheit Bioresonaztechnik-Replika), (Commando Control Unit Bioresonance Technology Replika 'Hummingbird') or Kolibri, are Generation 6 High-Tech Bioresonance Specialist Replikas. They are advanced Replikas acting as support for the FLKR unit.

[Eusan Nation] LSTR (Landvermessungs-/Schiff-Techniker Replika), (Land Survey/Ship Technician Replika 'Magpie') or Elster, are Generation 5 Kosmo-Pioneer Specialist Replikas. Primarily used as Combat Engineers and Technicians.

[Eusan Nation] MNHR (Minenarbeit-,Nukleartechnik-,Hochsicherheits-Replika), (Mining, Nuclear Tech, High-Security Replika 'Mynah') or Mynah are Generation 3 Industrial Specialist Replikas. They are used for handeling dangerous cargo, heavy machinery and operating in hazardous environments

[Eusan Nation] STAR (Sicherheitstechniker-Aufseher-Replika), (Security Technician Guard Replika 'Starling') or Star, are Generation 4 Low-Cost Combat Replikas. As Protektor Security Technicians, they tower over regular humans, giving them an intimindating presence.

[Eusan Nation] STCR (Sicherheitstechniker-Controller-Replika), (Security Technician Controller Replika 'Stork') or Storch, are Generation 5 Combat Lead Replikas. These units are deployed as overwatch and coordination of STARs.
[Eusan Nation] Almost all the Replika types are named after birds in German

[Eusan Nation] At some point during the war, Vineta was blockaded and bombarded by the Imperial Fleet of the Eusan Empire. The moon was shattered into many massive fragments, the landmass bombarded by both moon fragments and orbital strikes, resulting the transformation of Vineta into a water flooded world.
[Eusan Nation] Your rationmarks are the only thing that keeps you from starving. Too bad you dont have much anyway.

[Eusan Nation] The Penrose Program is the flagship deep space exploration program of the Eusan Nation. Hundreds of these small exploration craft have been sent out into the void to find new worlds and planets to expand the Eusan Nation.
[Eusan Nation] The K4 Ration, Schnitzel with concentrated cranberry sauce, is roughly 1200 kj of energy and is manufactued by the Volkseigener Betrieb Rotfront Orbital Hydroponik
[Eusan Nation] The F99 Ration, Weisswurst with sweet mustard and pretzel pieces is 900 kj of energy and is manufactued by the Volkseigener Betrieb Rotfront Orbital Hydroponik.
[Eusan Nation] The Ration C, Roast pork with freeze dried rice, is 800 kj of energy and is manufactued by the Volkseigener Leng Lebensmittel Produziert at the S-23 Serpenski Facility
[Eusan Nation] The Ration S, Island-style fish and noodle soup, is 400 kj of energy and is manufactured by the Volkseigener Leng Lebensmittel Produziert at the S-23 Serpenski Facility

[Eusan Nation] Buyan, the 1st planet of the star system was home to the Imperial Palace and by the end of the war, the last bastion of the Imperial military. Now its home to a nascent colonial effort by the Nation.

[Eusan Nation] Kitezh was the 3rd planet of the star system and for over 100 years the breadbasket of the entire star system. The war between the Nation and the Empire destroyed the fragile ecosystem and the red deserts seem to be reclaiming the planet back.
[Eusan Nation] Rotfront is the main colonial effort by the Nation. Most Vinetans evacuated have been sent here to ease the burden off an overtaxed Vineta
[Eusan Nation] Leng is the outermost planet and the most remote settlement in the star system. Those who live there either don't have a choice or were unfourtunate to be born there.
[Eusan Nation] Heimat, the captial of the Nation. The planet orbits a gas giant in which at certain times the view of the massive rings is said to be beautiful.

[Eusan Nation] Vineta was the original center of the star system where most people lived. Wars have destroyed much of it, drowning the planet in water and forcing the Nation to relocate people offworld.
[Eusan Nation] Do Replikas have feet? Maybe.
